dashboard.label: Activity
dashboard.description: Vendor-neutral steps, calories, activity breakdown, trends and HR training zones (Wearables data model)
dashboard.definition:
{"title":"Activity","description":"Steps, calories, activity breakdown and trends","defaults":{"dataSources":{"ds.search":{"options":{"queryParameters":{"latest":"$global_time.latest$","earliest":"$global_time.earliest$"}}}},"visualizations":{"global":{"showProgressBar":true}}},"inputs":{"input_global_trp":{"type":"input.timerange","options":{"token":"global_time","defaultValue":"-7d@d,now"},"title":"Time Range"},"input_person":{"type":"input.dropdown","title":"Person (temp)","options":{"token":"person","defaultValue":"*","items":[{"label":"All people","value":"*"},{"label":"P001","value":"P001"},{"label":"P002","value":"P002"}]}}},"dataSources":{"ds_activity_latest":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_activity person_id="$person$" | dedup id | sort -_time | head 1 | eval distance_km=round(distance_m/1000,2), score=activity_score, sg=coalesce(step_goal,10000), cg=coalesce(calorie_goal,400), dg=coalesce(distance_goal_m,8000), stepcolor=case(steps>=sg,"#4CAF50",steps>=sg*0.5,"#F4A422",true(),"#E8503A"), calcolor=case(active_calories>=cg,"#4CAF50",active_calories>=cg*0.5,"#F4A422",true(),"#E8503A"), distcolor=case(distance_m>=dg,"#4CAF50",distance_m>=dg*0.5,"#F4A422",true(),"#E8503A") | table score, steps, active_calories, total_calories, distance_km, inactivity_alerts, stepcolor, calcolor, distcolor","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Activity — latest (tiles)"},"ds_breakdown":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_activity person_id="$person$" | dedup id | sort -_time | head 1 | eval High=round(high_activity_time/60,0), Medium=round(medium_activity_time/60,0), Low=round(low_activity_time/60,0), Sedentary=round(sedentary_time/60,0), Resting=round(resting_time/60,0) | table High, Medium, Low, Sedentary, Resting | transpose | rename column as activity_type, "row 1" as minutes","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Activity time breakdown"},"ds_contributors":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_activity person_id="$person$" | dedup id | sort -_time | head 1 | eval "Meet Daily Targets"=round('contributors.meet_daily_targets',0), "Move Every Hour"=round('contributors.move_every_hour',0), "Recovery Time"=round('contributors.recovery_time',0), "Stay Active"=round('contributors.stay_active',0), "Training Frequency"=round('contributors.training_frequency',0), "Training Volume"=round('contributors.training_volume',0) | table "Meet Daily Targets","Move Every Hour","Recovery Time","Stay Active","Training Frequency","Training Volume" | transpose | rename column as contributor, "row 1" as score | sort -score","queryParameters":{"earliest":"-2d","latest":"now"}},"name":"Activity score contributors"},"ds_steps_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_activity person_id="$person$" | dedup id | timechart span=1d@d avg(steps) as Steps","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}},"name":"Daily steps trend"},"ds_cal_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_activity person_id="$person$" | dedup id | timechart span=1d@d avg(active_calories) as "Active Cal", avg(total_calories) as "Total Cal"","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}},"name":"Calorie trend"},"ds_score_trend":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_activity person_id="$person$" | dedup id | timechart span=1d@d avg(activity_score) as Score","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}},"name":"Activity score trend"},"ds_time_in_zone":{"type":"ds.chain","name":"Active time in zone (daily)","options":{"extend":"ds_zone_base","query":"| eval zone=case(pct<0.5,"Z0 Recovery",pct<0.6,"Z1 Very Light",pct<0.7,"Z2 Light",pct<0.8,"Z3 Moderate",pct<0.9,"Z4 Hard",true(),"Z5 Max") | sort - _time | streamstats window=1 current=false last(_time) as next_time | sort _time | eval next_time=coalesce(next_time,_time) | eval duration_sec=next_time-_time | eval duration_sec=if(duration_sec>600 OR duration_sec<0,0,duration_sec) | where zone!="Z0 Recovery" | eval day=strftime(_time, "%Y-%m-%d") | stats sum(duration_sec) as total_sec by day zone | eval minutes=round(total_sec/60,1) | xyseries day zone minutes | fields day "Z5 Max" "Z4 Hard" "Z3 Moderate" "Z2 Light" "Z1 Very Light""}},"ds_workout_zones":{"type":"ds.search","options":{"query":"index=wearables (tag=wearable_heartrate OR sourcetype=oura:workouts) person_id="$person$" | append [search index=wearables tag=wearable_daily wearable_dataset=person_info person_id="$person$" earliest=-2d latest=now | head 1 | fields age] | append [search index=wearables tag=wearable_heartrate person_id="$person$" | where bpm<=200 | eval d=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%d") | stats min(bpm) as dm by d | stats median(dm) as resting_hr | fields resting_hr] | eventstats max(age) as user_age, max(resting_hr) as resting_hr | eval rec_start=if(sourcetype=="oura:workouts", strptime(start_datetime,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%3N%z"), _time) | eval rec_end=if(sourcetype=="oura:workouts", strptime(end_datetime,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%3N%z"), null()) | sort rec_start | streamstats current=t last(eval(if(sourcetype=="oura:workouts",id,null()))) as active_id last(eval(if(sourcetype=="oura:workouts",rec_end,null()))) as active_end last(eval(if(sourcetype=="oura:workouts",activity,null()))) as active_activity last(eval(if(sourcetype=="oura:workouts",start_datetime,null()))) as active_start_str | eval in_workout=if(isnotnull(bpm) AND isnotnull(active_end) AND _time<=active_end, 1, 0) | where in_workout=1 | dedup timestamp | eval max_hr=round(208-0.7*user_age,0) | where bpm<=max_hr*1.2 | eval hrr=max_hr-resting_hr | stats avg(bpm) as avg_hr, max(bpm) as max_hr_reached, count as samples, min(_time) as t_start, max(_time) as t_end, values(active_start_str) as start_str by active_id, active_activity, max_hr, resting_hr, hrr | eval avg_hr=round(avg_hr,0) | eval pct=(avg_hr-resting_hr)/hrr | eval zone=case(pct<0.5,"Z0 Recovery",pct<0.6,"Z1 Very Light",pct<0.7,"Z2 Light",pct<0.8,"Z3 Moderate",pct<0.9,"Z4 Hard",true(),"Z5 Max") | eval start_display=strftime(strptime(start_str,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S.%3N%z"),"%b %d %H:%M") | eval duration_min=round((t_end-t_start)/60, 0) | eval duration=duration_min." min" | sort -start_str | head 10 | rename start_display AS Start, active_activity AS Activity, avg_hr AS "Avg HR", max_hr_reached AS "Max HR", zone AS Zone, duration AS Duration | table Start, Activity, "Avg HR", "Max HR", Zone, Duration","queryParameters":{"earliest":"$global_time.earliest$","latest":"$global_time.latest$"}},"name":"Workout zones (Oura-detected)"},"ds_zone_inputs":{"type":"ds.chain","name":"Karvonen inputs (age/RHR/maxHR/HRR)","options":{"extend":"ds_karvonen_base","query":"| table age, resting_hr, max_hr, hrr"}},"ds_zone_boundaries":{"type":"ds.chain","name":"HR zone BPM boundaries","options":{"extend":"ds_karvonen_base","query":"| eval z1_b=round(resting_hr+0.5*hrr,0), z2_b=round(resting_hr+0.6*hrr,0), z3_b=round(resting_hr+0.7*hrr,0), z4_b=round(resting_hr+0.8*hrr,0), z5_b=round(resting_hr+0.9*hrr,0) | eval row=" ", "Z5 Max"=max_hr-z5_b, "Z4 Hard"=z5_b-z4_b, "Z3 Moderate"=z4_b-z3_b, "Z2 Light"=z3_b-z2_b, "Z1 Very Light"=z2_b-z1_b, "Z0 Recovery"=z1_b | table row "Z5 Max" "Z4 Hard" "Z3 Moderate" "Z2 Light" "Z1 Very Light" "Z0 Recovery""}},"ds_hr_zones_v2":{"type":"ds.chain","name":"HR zone timeline","options":{"extend":"ds_zone_base","query":"| eval zone_num=case(pct<0.5,1,pct<0.6,2,pct<0.7,3,pct<0.8,4,pct<0.9,5,true(),6) | timechart span=15m max(zone_num) as zone_num | where isnotnull(zone_num) | streamstats first(_time) as t0 | eval offset_min=round((_time-t0)/60,0), time_label=strftime(_time,"%H:%M"), date_label=strftime(_time,"%b %d"), stage=case(zone_num=1,"Z0 Recovery",zone_num=2,"Z1 Very Light",zone_num=3,"Z2 Light",zone_num=4,"Z3 Moderate",zone_num=5,"Z4 Hard",zone_num=6,"Z5 Max",true(),"Unknown") | where stage!="Unknown" | table offset_min, time_label, date_label, stage"}},"ds_zone_base":{"type":"ds.search","name":"HR zones — shared base","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_heartrate person_id="$person$" | append [search index=wearables tag=wearable_daily wearable_dataset=person_info person_id="$person$" earliest=-2d latest=now | head 1 | fields age] | append [search index=wearables tag=wearable_heartrate person_id="$person$" | where bpm<=200 | eval d=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%d") | stats min(bpm) as dm by d | stats median(dm) as resting_hr | fields resting_hr] | eventstats max(age) as user_age, max(resting_hr) as resting_hr | where isnotnull(bpm) | dedup timestamp | eval max_hr=round(208-0.7*user_age,0) | where bpm<=max_hr*1.2 | eval hrr=max_hr-resting_hr, pct=(bpm-resting_hr)/hrr | fields _time, pct"}},"ds_karvonen_base":{"type":"ds.search","name":"Karvonen inputs — shared base","options":{"query":"index=wearables tag=wearable_heartrate person_id="$person$" | where bpm<=200 | eval d=strftime(_time,"%Y-%m-%d") | stats min(bpm) as dm by d | stats median(dm) as resting_hr | eval resting_hr=round(resting_hr,0) | append [search index=wearables tag=wearable_daily wearable_dataset=person_info person_id="$person$" earliest=-2d latest=now | head 1 | fields age] | stats max(resting_hr) as resting_hr, max(age) as age | eval max_hr=round(208-0.7*age,0), hrr=max_hr-resting_hr"}}},"visualizations":{"score_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_activity_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"score","majorColor":"> majorValue | rangeValue(colorRange)","context":{"colorRange":[{"from":0,"to":60,"value":"#E8503A"},{"from":60,"to":75,"value":"#F4A422"},{"from":75,"to":100,"value":"#4CAF50"}]},"majorFontSize":72,"label":"Activity Score","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('score')","align":"left"},"title":"Activity Score"},"steps_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalueradial","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_activity_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"steps","majorColor":"#FFFFFF","majorFontSize":32,"label":"Steps","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('steps')","radialStrokeColor":"> primary | seriesByName('stepcolor') | lastPoint()","minValue":0,"maxValue":10000},"title":"Steps Today"},"active_cal_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalueradial","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_activity_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"active_calories","majorColor":"#FFFFFF","majorFontSize":32,"label":"Active Cal","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" kcal","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('active_calories')","radialStrokeColor":"> primary | seriesByName('calcolor') | lastPoint()","minValue":0,"maxValue":400},"title":"Active Calories"},"total_cal_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_activity_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"total_calories","majorColor":"#F4A422","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Total Cal","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" kcal","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('total_calories')","align":"left"},"title":"Total Calories"},"distance_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalueradial","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_activity_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"distance_km","majorColor":"#FFFFFF","majorFontSize":32,"label":"Distance","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" km","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('distance_km')","radialStrokeColor":"> primary | seriesByName('distcolor') | lastPoint()","minValue":0,"maxValue":8},"title":"Walk Equivalent"},"inactivity_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_activity_latest"},"options":{"majorField":"inactivity_alerts","majorColor":"#F4A422","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Inactivity Alerts","showLabel":false,"labelFontSize":13,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","trendValue":"> sparklineValues | delta(-2)","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('inactivity_alerts')","align":"left"},"title":"Inactivity Alerts"},"breakdown_bar":{"type":"splunk.bar","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_breakdown"},"options":{"xAxisField":"activity_type","seriesColors":["#BE8C3E"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","showRoundedBars":true,"legendDisplay":"off","showDataLabels":"all","yAxisTitle":"Minutes"},"title":"Activity Time Breakdown"},"contributors_bar":{"type":"splunk.bar","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_contributors"},"options":{"xAxisField":"contributor","seriesColors":["#8B7FB0"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","showRoundedBars":true,"legendDisplay":"off","showDataLabels":"all","yAxisMin":0,"yAxisMax":100},"title":"Activity Contributors"},"steps_trend":{"type":"splunk.column","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_steps_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#BE8C3E"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"off","yAxisTitle":"Steps"},"title":"Daily Steps"},"cal_trend":{"type":"splunk.area","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_cal_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#F4A422","#E8503A"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"bottom","stackedSeries":false,"yAxisTitle":"Calories"},"title":"Calorie Trend"},"score_trend":{"type":"splunk.line","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_score_trend"},"options":{"xAxisField":"_time","seriesColors":["#4CAF50"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"off","showDots":true,"lineWidth":2,"yAxisMin":0,"yAxisMax":100,"yAxisTitle":"Score"},"title":"Activity Score Trend"},"time_in_zone_bar":{"type":"splunk.column","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_time_in_zone"},"options":{"xAxisField":"day","seriesColors":["#E8503A","#E8843A","#F4A422","#4263B8","#00CDAF"],"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","legendDisplay":"bottom","yAxisTitle":"Minutes","stackMode":"stacked","yAxisTitleVisibility":"show","yAxisTitleText":"Minutes"},"title":"Active Time in Zone (Daily)"},"workout_zones_table":{"type":"splunk.table","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_workout_zones"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","count":10,"columnFormat":{"Start":{"align":"left"},"Activity":{"align":"left"},"Avg HR":{"align":"left"},"Max HR":{"align":"left"},"Zone":{"align":"left"},"Duration":{"align":"left"}}},"title":"Workout Zones (Oura-detected only)"},"age_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_zone_inputs"},"options":{"majorField":"age","majorColor":"#FFFFFF","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Age","showLabel":false,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('age')","align":"left"},"title":"Age"},"resting_hr_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_zone_inputs"},"options":{"majorField":"resting_hr","majorColor":"#4CAF50","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Resting HR (30d baseline)","showLabel":false,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" bpm","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('resting_hr')","align":"left"},"title":"Resting HR"},"max_hr_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_zone_inputs"},"options":{"majorField":"max_hr","majorColor":"#FFFFFF","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Max HR (220 - age)","showLabel":false,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" bpm","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('max_hr')","align":"left"},"title":"Max HR (Tanaka)"},"hrr_sv":{"type":"splunk.singlevalue","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_zone_inputs"},"options":{"majorField":"hrr","majorColor":"#FFFFFF","majorFontSize":42,"label":"Heart Rate Reserve","showLabel":false,"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","trendDisplay":"off","sparklineDisplay":"off","unit":" bpm","unitPosition":"after","majorValue":"> sparklineValues | lastPoint()","sparklineValues":"> primary | seriesByName('hrr')","align":"left"},"title":"HR Reserve"},"hrzone_v2":{"type":"hypnogram_viz.hypnogram","title":"Heart Rate Zone Timeline (Karvonen %HRR - custom hypnogram vis)","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_hr_zones_v2"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","contentOpacity":0.6,"slotMinutes":15,"lanes":"[{"label": "Z5 Max", "color": "#E8503A"}, {"label": "Z4 Hard", "color": "#E8843A"}, {"label": "Z3 Moderate", "color": "#F4A422"}, {"label": "Z2 Light", "color": "#4263B8"}, {"label": "Z1 Very Light", "color": "#00CDAF"}, {"label": "Z0 Recovery", "color": "#4CAF50"}]"}},"zone_band":{"type":"splunk.bar","title":"Heart Rate Zones (BPM)","dataSources":{"primary":"ds_zone_boundaries"},"options":{"backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)","stackMode":"stacked","xAxisField":"row","seriesColors":["#E8503A","#E8843A","#F4A422","#4263B8","#00CDAF","#4CAF50"],"legendDisplay":"bottom","yAxisTitle":"BPM","yAxisTitleText":"BPM","yAxisTitleVisibility":"show"}},"zones_guide":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"### About these zones
- **Karvonen / %HRR** — zones set as a percentage of your *Heart Rate Reserve* (Max HR − Resting HR), personalized by your resting HR — not just % of max.
- **Max HR (Tanaka)** — estimated maximum heart rate = 208 − 0.7 × age.
- **HR Reserve (HRR)** — Max HR − Resting HR.
- **Z0–Z5** — Recovery / Very Light / Light / Moderate / Hard / Max effort, at 0 / 50 / 60 / 70 / 80 / 90% of HRR.

**Learn more:** [Cleveland Clinic — Heart Rate Reserve & the Karvonen method](https://my.clevelandclinic.org/health/articles/24649-heart-rate-reserve)","backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)"}},"activity_guide":{"type":"splunk.markdown","options":{"markdown":"### About these metrics
- **Activity Score** — your device’s daily 0–100 rating of how you balance activity, inactivity, and rest.
- **Steps Today** — cumulative steps for the latest day your device has synced (a per-day total, *not* a rolling 24 hours); it shows the last synced day until today’s data arrives, then accumulates through the day.
- **Walk Equivalent** — your total daily energy burn expressed as an equivalent walking distance — *not* literal steps distance.
- **Active vs Total Calories** — Active = calories from movement; Total = active plus your resting (baseline) burn.
- **Daily goals** — the Steps / Active Calories / Walk Equivalent gauges fill toward each goal (green = met). Calorie & distance goals come from your device; the **step goal comes from your person profile** (`wearable_person_profile` lookup).","backgroundColor":"rgba(15,17,23,0.50)"}}},"layout":{"options":{},"globalInputs":["input_global_trp"],"tabs":{"items":[{"layoutId":"layout_1","label":"Activity"},{"layoutId":"layout_2","label":"Training Zones"}]},"layoutDefinitions":{"layout_1":{"type":"absolute","structure":[{"item":"score_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":20,"w":220,"h":190}},{"item":"steps_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":260,"y":20,"w":195,"h":190}},{"item":"active_cal_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":475,"y":20,"w":195,"h":190}},{"item":"total_cal_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":905,"y":20,"w":195,"h":190}},{"item":"distance_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":690,"y":20,"w":195,"h":190}},{"item":"inactivity_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":1120,"y":20,"w":195,"h":190}},{"item":"breakdown_bar","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":230,"w":450,"h":280}},{"item":"contributors_bar","type":"block","position":{"x":490,"y":230,"w":450,"h":280}},{"item":"score_trend","type":"block","position":{"x":960,"y":230,"w":460,"h":280}},{"item":"steps_trend","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":530,"w":680,"h":280}},{"item":"cal_trend","type":"block","position":{"x":720,"y":530,"w":700,"h":280}},{"item":"activity_guide","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":830,"w":1400,"h":210}}],"options":{"width":1440,"height":1060,"display":"auto","backgroundImage":{"x":0,"y":0,"src":"/static/app/oura_health/bg_health.svg","sizeType":"cover"}},"globalInputs":["input_person"]},"layout_2":{"type":"absolute","options":{"width":1440,"height":1090,"display":"auto","backgroundImage":{"x":0,"y":0,"src":"/static/app/oura_health/bg_health.svg","sizeType":"cover"}},"structure":[{"item":"age_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":20,"w":200,"h":170}},{"item":"resting_hr_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":240,"y":20,"w":200,"h":170}},{"item":"max_hr_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":460,"y":20,"w":200,"h":170}},{"item":"hrr_sv","type":"block","position":{"x":680,"y":20,"w":200,"h":170}},{"item":"zone_band","type":"block","position":{"x":900,"y":20,"w":520,"h":170}},{"item":"time_in_zone_bar","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":540,"w":680,"h":300}},{"item":"workout_zones_table","type":"block","position":{"x":720,"y":540,"w":700,"h":300}},{"item":"hrzone_v2","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":220,"w":1400,"h":300}},{"item":"zones_guide","type":"block","position":{"x":20,"y":860,"w":1400,"h":210}}],"globalInputs":["input_person"]}}}}
